mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SY_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO
SELECT * FROM SY_CODE WHERE (PARENT_CODE_NO IS NULL OR PARENT_CODE_NO = '') ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO

WITH CODE_TREE AS ( SELECT * FROM SY_CODE WHERE CODE_NO = #{rootCodeNo} UNION ALL SELECT c.* FROM SY_CODE c INNER JOIN CODE_TREE ct ON c.PARENT_CODE_NO = ct.CODE_NO WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1 ) SELECT * FROM CODE_TREE ORDER BY DEPTH, ORDERNO, CODE_NO
SELECT * FROM SY_CODE WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY GROUP_CODE, ORDERNO, CODE_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_CODE SET DESCRIPTION = #{description}, DEPTH = #{depth}, PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCodeNo}, OPERATION_ID = #{operationId}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, REMARK = #{remark}, GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode}, CODE_ID = #{codeId} WHERE CODE_NO = #{codeNo}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT GROUP_CODE FROM SY_CODE WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 AND GROUP_CODE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY GROUP_CODE

SELECT c.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM SY_CODE c LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON c.CODE_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON c.CODE_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON c.CODE_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1
AND c.PARENT_CODE_NO = #{parentCodeNo}
AND (c.PARENT_CODE_NO IS NULL OR c.PARENT_CODE_NO = '')
ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO

SELECT c.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM SY_CODE c LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CODE_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' AND gvi.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON c.CODE_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' AND gen.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON c.CODE_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' AND gzh.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON c.CODE_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' AND gko.ACTIVITY = 1 WHERE c.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ( c.CODE_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gen.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gzh.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gko.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CODE_NO
